name: tabs
title: Tabs
description: Panel switcher with pill, line, and segment variants.

api.description: Panel switcher with pill, line, and segment variants in horizontal or vertical orientation. Label ink is optically centered to cap height with text-box when available, and a 1cap line box otherwise. Compose Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, and TabsContent.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style. pill = soft rounded track; line = underline; segment = equal width mode switcher with a sliding chip (e.g. color input modes).

props.name: size
props.description: Trigger height and type size.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout axis. horizontal puts triggers in a row with the panel below; vertical stacks triggers in a column with the panel alongside. Arrow key navigation switches to Up/Down.

props.name: lineSide
props.description: For the line variant only: which edge holds the divider and active indicator. Horizontal layouts accept top or bottom; vertical layouts accept left or right. Prefer left when the list sits to the right of its content so the line faces the panel.

props.name: lineAlign
props.description: For the line variant only. Leave unset so the list sizes to its triggers. Choose start or end to stretch the divider across the available width and group the tabs on that side. In a horizontal layout, start places tabs on the left and end places them on the right. In a vertical layout, start places tabs at the top and end places them at the bottom.

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius for the track, sliding chip, and triggers. Defaults: pill full (2xl when vertical), segment lg. Line ignores radius.

props.name: cornerShape
props.description: Corner curve for pill and segment chrome. Omit to inherit --df-corner-shape from the theme.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap inside each trigger between leading icon, label, and trailing badge. Design-scale units from the shared spacing scale (none/0, even integers through 200, half-steps like 0.5 and 1.5). One unit = 0.25rem via --spacing-unit.

props.name: spacing
props.description: Gap between triggers in the list. Same design-scale units as gap. Defaults keep pill and line flush and segment slightly open.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled active tab value.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial tab value.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the active tab changes.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the root.

groups.title: TabsList
groups.description: Container for triggers. Inherits variant, size, and radius from Tabs. Hosts the animated active indicator.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the list.

props.name: children
props.description: TabsTrigger children.

props.name: value
props.description: Tab value this trigger activates (required).

props.name: leading
props.description: Icon or node before the label.

props.name: trailing
props.description: Node after the label. Pass a Badge with a count for notifications.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-interactive trigger. Skipped by pointer and selection.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger label.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button props.

props.name: value
props.description: Shows when this value is active (required).

props.name: forceMount
props.description: Keep content mounted when inactive.

props.name: children
props.description: Panel content.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles on the panel.

groups.title: Segment variant
groups.description: Equal width segmented control for compact mode switching. The active chip slides between options with transform animation.

props.name: variant
props.description: Use on Tabs. List fills available width; triggers share space evenly.

props.name: size
props.description: Compact type and padding. Color Picker uses size="sm".

props.name: radius
props.description: Corner radius for the track and sliding chip. Segment defaults to lg.

props.name: Animated indicator
props.description: TabsList renders a sliding background chip behind the active trigger. Honors prefers-reduced-motion.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-tabs-indicator-thickness
props.description: Line variant indicator thickness.

props.name: --df-shadow-tabs-indicator
props.description: Shadow under the sliding indicator.

props.name: --df-tabs-gap
props.description: Instance variable set by the gap prop. Sizes the gap between leading icon, label, and trailing badge inside a trigger.

props.name: --df-tabs-spacing
props.description: Instance variable set by the spacing prop. Sizes the gap between triggers in the list.

props.name: --df-tabs-panel-gap
props.description: Instance variable set between the list and its panel.

props.name: --muted
props.description: Pill variant track fill.

props.name: --background
props.description: Active trigger and sliding chip fill.

props.name: --foreground
props.description: Active trigger label.

props.name: --border
props.description: Line variant divider.

props.name: --df-corner-shape
props.description: Theme corner curve for all kit chrome. round = circular arcs; smooth = continuous squircle. Set with df-ui init --corner-shape, or override on :root. Default round.

props.name: --df-label-line-height
props.description: Line box for label flex centering. Defaults to --df-leading-none. When text-box is unavailable and the cap unit is supported, the kit sets this to 1cap so flex centering matches cap-height ink.
